stemHtml: Select the correct statement in regard to a symmetrical aerofoil section.

options.a: A nose up pitching moment exists when the Lift Coefficient equals zero.
options.b: A nose down pitching moment exists when the Lift Coefficient equals zero.
options.c: The Angle Of Attack has a positive value when the lift coefficient equals zero.
options.d: The Angle Of Attack is zero when the Lift Coefficient equals zero.
